log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Tortle — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 18 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.

REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Tortle — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 18] CRITICAL HIT! 60 damage. Tortle — Iron Concentration HP: 7/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
